creator: joshruehlig@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 260010
Patch to upgrade RTPProxy to version 3.1.1

Attached is my first attempt to address the comments by Daniel.

Listed below are some improvements that could be made before/after we commit this update.

* Improve 'scripts/rtpproxy.in.freebsd'
> Push ${SED} and patch file changes upstream
> Add additional options of min_port and max_port

* Create ports for libre (https://github.com/creytiv/re) and add it to LIB_DEPENDS

* Confirm if/why "AR=llvm-ar RANLIB=llvm-ranlib" is needed
